mapper.select: SELECT MIN(rent) FROM room_info WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND is_release = 1 AND apartment_id = #{apartmentId}

SELECT ri.id, ri.room_number, ri.rent, ri.apartment_id, ai.name AS apartment_name, ai.district_id, ai.district_name, ai.city_id, ai.city_name, ai.province_id, ai.province_name, ai.address_detail, ai.latitude, ai.longitude FROM room_info ri LEFT JOIN apartment_info ai ON ri.apartment_id = ai.id AND ai.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ri.is_deleted = 0 AND ri.is_release = 1 AND ri.apartment_id = #{apartmentId} ORDER BY ri.id DESC
